emails.subject: Valero's February Gas Nominations
emails.body: Daren I am looking for 5.000/d at meter 1394 and 10.000/d at meter 8018 for Feb. Currently it is 10.000/d at 1394 and 5.000/d at 8018. Can I change the tickets or will you? Attached is the confirmation spreadsheet from Valero. Thanks. Aimee Forwarded by Aimee Lannou/HOU/ECT on 01/31/2001 07:54 AM <DyckD@valero.com> on 01/30/2001 02:51:39 PM
